title: Challenge Pack
description:
Challenge yourself and beat the game with different challenges!
Or just play for fun if hardcore is not enough!

This is my first datapack!
body:
**This Challenge Pack adds various challenges to vannila minecraft!**

**Currently in this pack you will find these 15 challenges**
- **XP health** | Your max health is defined by your XP level.
- **Dark mission** | Makes night time permanent and deals damage on light levels above 11.
- **No block drops** | Blocks will no longer drop items. Just like the gamerule.
- **No armor** | Removes any armor in your inventory. Except for horse armor.
- **Damaged hearing** | Disables all ingame sounds. But it's not perfect.
- **Random sounds** | Plays random mob sounds at random intervals at random locations around you.
- **Random knockback** | Mobs take knockback in random directions.
- **No jump** | No jump. Simple.
- **Random projectiles** | Picks a random projectile and replaces the original one.
- **No crafting** | It will block all recipes except the important ones.
- **No wood** | Will delete wood from inventory.
- **Mob swap** | Swaps 2 random mobs with each other.
- **Locked inventory** | Locks 27 inventory slots.
- **Half size** | Shrinks you to half your original size.
- **No breaking** | Like in adventure mode. But blocks can be placed.

**Hardcore challenge variants**
- **XP health** | Taking damage also takes away your XP levels.
- **Dark mission** | Makes day time permanent.
- **No block drops** | You will not be able to get any blocks.
- **Random sounds** | Summons a mob that disappears after 2 seconds.
- **Random knockback** | Mobs take knockback in your direction.
- **No crafting** | Only 2 recipes will remain unlocked.
- **Locked inventory** | Locks 35 inventory slots.
- **Mob swap** | Mob swaps are more frequent.
- **No jump** | Gravity is stronger.
- **Half size** | Grows you to half your original size.

**To enable or disable challenge you need to click on ✓** | _Green = enabled_ | _Gray = disabled_

To open the menu, just type **/trigger pack_info** or **reload datapack**.

**Admin mode feature**
- Admin mode is made for server usage. While admin mode is enabled, only admins can use and see trigger commands.
- To enable this feature you need to go to this file: _[Challenge Pack\data\pack\functions\settings.mcfunction]_ and follow the instructions in that folder.
- **To edit file you will need transfer datapack out of .zip folder to normal folder!**

**Random teleport feature**
- Allows you to set up a random teleport area. You can set the maximum size of the area and the distance between players.
**But watch out! If you have a world that does not have a solid surface, the game may crash while searching for a place to teleport!**


Before you delete the datapack from the folder, open the menu and click on the delete button. This will delete everything created by this datapack like scoreboards etc.
